evidence.snippet:
](#)
Moog Inc. is a leading provider of advanced propulsion solutions for a wide range of aerospace and defense applications. Our expertise spans across chemical, electric, and cold gas propulsion systems**,** and is suited for applications in spacecraft, eVTOL aircraft, and UAVs.
Our components and systems offer comprehensive solutions to fit our customer's unique specifications.
Propulsion Applications

products.name: Integrated Motion Assemblies (Gimbals)
products.descriptor: Precision gimbal systems for payload stabilization in space, defense, and aerospace

evidence.snippet:
Moog gimbal systems deliver unmatched precision, stability, and control. Engineered for mission-critical environments, our gimbals support payloads with exacting accuracy whether tracking satellites in orbit or stabilizing sensors in flight. Explore our specialized solutions designed to meet the rigorous standards of both space exploration and defense operations.
Advanced Gimbal Solutions for Space, Defense, and Aerospace Missions
--------------------------------------------------------------------

products.name: 2-Axis Motor Controllers (MC100D / MC500D / MC1000D)
products.descriptor: Digital 2-axis brushless motor controllers for 24 V military vehicle turret drives

evidence.snippet:
2-Axis Motor Controllers
========================
### For 24V Military Vehicles

### MC100D
The smallest controller in the family the MC100D can output 80Apk/axis in a compact, lightweight package. This controller has an internal tilt/accelerometer sensor for improved stabilization performance.
### MC500D

products.name: Defense Actuators (Multi-Purpose / Electromechanical / Electrohydrostatic)
products.descriptor: Electrohydraulic, electromechanical, and electrohydrostatic actuators for defense applications

evidence.snippet:
Moog is the premier supplier of electrohydraulic, electromechanical, electropneumatic, and electrohydrostatic actuators for the defense industry. Moog provides the broadest range of actuation solutions in the industry, from fractional horsepower actuators for tactical missiles to over 100 horsepower actuators for submarines.
[CONTACT OUR EXPERTS >](/contact-us/markets.defense.html)

products.name: Third Generation Weapon Stores Management System (SMS)
products.descriptor: MOSA-compliant COTS airborne weapons control and fire-control system integrating with aircraft sensors

evidence.snippet:
### **Weapon Stores Management**
The Third Generation Weapon Stores Management System (SMS) is a Modular Open System Approach (MOSA) compliant COTS weapons control system that seamlessly integrates with aircraft sensors and mission management systems to provide the crew with a superior fire-control solution.

products.name: Land Electromechanical Rotary Actuators
products.descriptor: EM rotary actuators for combat vehicle turret azimuth drives and heavy payload slew applications

evidence.snippet: ### Land Electromechanical Rotary Actuators

These actuators are used for new and existing combat vehicle platform control applications, heavy payloads requiring high slew-to-cue capability, and as a power drive unit for larger mechanical actuated systems.

products.name: Land Electromechanical Linear Actuators
products.descriptor: EM linear actuators for main battle tanks, howitzers, and military ground vehicle leveling

evidence.snippet: ### Land Electromechanical Linear Actuators

These actuators are used for modern main battle tanks, new combat vehicle platform control applications, howitzer gun laying systems, elevation of heavy payloads, and for the leveling of military ground vehicles such as trailers, light trucks, and palleted weapon systems.
